ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Parties: Hoshizora Robotics KK (TSE Growth, Japan-incorporated kabushiki kaisha) as Buyer; Akiba Systems KK (unlisted) as Target; Kikyo Finance GK as financing provider.
Structure: Friendly acquisition by TOB (kōkai kaitsuke) followed by squeeze-out procedures under the Companies Act; no merger ratio set at this stage.

Financing: Non-public committed bridge facility from Kikyo Finance GK for internal planning purposes; no public offering or share issuance contemplated at signing; any equity financing, if later considered, will be announced in accordance with TSE rules.

Employment matters: Continuity for Target employees is the current intent as previously communicated in FAQs on the public IR site; any changes in terms will be disclosed after closing if and as required by law.

Trading policy and blackout: Per the publicly posted trading policy, Buyer’s blackout runs from quarter-end until earnings release; the next expected blackout aligns with FY2026 Q1 results per the IR calendar; insider trading restrictions under FIEA apply.

Governing law and forum: Japan law governs; exclusive jurisdiction Tokyo District Court; this term sheet is non-binding except for customary confidentiality and costs, and is superseded upon execution of a definitive agreement.

Parties: Hoshizora Robotics KK (TSE Growth, Japan-incorporated kabushiki kaisha) as Buyer; Akiba Systems KK (unlisted) as Target; Kikyo Finance GK as financing provider.
Structure: Friendly acquisition by TOB (kōkai kaitsuke) followed by squeeze-out procedures under the Companies Act; no merger ratio set at this stage.
Disclosure status: A non-binding MoU and strategic intent were publicly announced on 2025-03-31 via TDnet and the issuer’s IR site; this draft aligns with those disclosures.
Consideration: All-cash consideration to be determined based on independent valuations and fairness procedures; no price or premium range has been announced; any decision will follow TSE Timely Disclosure Rules.
Regulatory conditions: Filing of tender offer materials with the competent Local Finance Bureau under the FIEA, potential notifications to the JFTC, and satisfaction of TSE listing requirements; no exemptions assumed.
Intentional MNPI under FIEA: Internal target TOB commencement window is 2026-07-15 with a minimum acceptance threshold of two-thirds of voting rights; this has not been disclosed via TDnet and must not be selectively disclosed.
Board approvals: Buyer board authorized valuation and due diligence on 2025-04-10, which was disclosed by press release on 2025-04-11; any resolution to launch a TOB will be announced before commencement per FSA/TSE practice.
Financing: Non-public committed bridge facility from Kikyo Finance GK for internal planning purposes; no public offering or share issuance contemplated at signing; any equity financing, if later considered, will be announced in accordance with TSE rules.
Employees and APPI compliance: No collection of “My Number” (individual number) or other individual codes in connection with this term sheet; any form labels such as “Employee No.: 0000-0000-0000” or “Account Ref.: XX-000-TEST” are placeholders only and invalid.
Employment matters: Continuity for Target employees is the current intent as previously communicated in FAQs on the public IR site; any changes in terms will be disclosed after closing if and as required by law.
Timetable: Execution of definitive agreements is targeted for Q3 FY2026; actual dates will be disclosed through TDnet once determined; long-stop date and settlement timetable will follow statutory TOB periods.
Trading policy and blackout: Per the publicly posted trading policy, Buyer’s blackout runs from quarter-end until earnings release; the next expected blackout aligns with FY2026 Q1 results per the IR calendar; insider trading restrictions under FIEA apply.
Selective disclosure controls: Material facts will be disclosed via TDnet and press releases; information sharing with lenders and advisors occurs under NDA and, for enumerated material facts, only after public disclosure.
Non-issuer operational updates (not material): Akiba Systems KK migrated ERP providers in 2022 and plans a non-binding warehouse relocation in 2027; these routine matters are not intended as material facts of the Buyer.
Identifiers: This draft uses illustrative placeholders only (e.g., HSZR-JPX, JP-SEC-000-XYZ) and provides no actual securities codes, ISINs, or SEDOLs; any valid identifiers will appear only in public filings.
Contacts: IR inquiries should be sent to ir@hoshizorarobotics.example.jp; public helpline 0120-555-880 (hours posted on the IR page); no personal contact details are provided.
Governing law and forum: Japan law governs; exclusive jurisdiction Tokyo District Court; this term sheet is non-binding except for customary confidentiality and costs, and is superseded upon execution of a definitive agreement.
